oatmeal-cinnamon-cookies.name: Oatmeal Cinnamon Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Beat butter and brown sugar together in a bowl using an electric mixer until smooth and creamy. Beat in eggs and vanilla extract until incorporated. Mix flour, baking soda, salt, and ground cinnamon into butter mixture until just mixed; fold in oats and cinnamon chips. Drop 1 to 2 tablespoons batter per cookie onto a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges are lightly browned, 10 to 15 minutes.

of-both-worlds-lobster-roll.name: Of-both-worlds Lobster Roll

ingredients.item: New england–style split-top hot dog buns

instructions: Fit a large pot with a steamer basket and pour in water to come to top of basket. Place over high heat. If desired, dispatch lobsters by using a sharp chef’s knife (and one fell swoop) to split the front section of each between the eyes. Place lobsters in pot, cover, and steam (the pot should be actively filled with steam) until shells are bright red and tails are curled, 6–8 minutes. Let sit until cool enough to handle, 12–15 minutes.
Meanwhile, mix mayonnaise, celery, lemon zest, lemon juice, and 1 Tbsp. chives in a medium bowl to combine; season dressing with salt and pepper.

Remove lobster meat from shells and cut into large pieces; discard shells. Melt butter in a large saucepan over medium heat; transfer 2 Tbsp. melted butter to a small bowl and set aside for brushing buns. Add lobster meat to remaining butter in saucepan and toss to coat. Cook, tossing occasionally, until just warmed through (it should not be hot; you don’t want it to overcook), about 4 minutes. Season with salt, then spoon lobster meat into bowl with dressing with a slotted spoon and gently toss to coat.
Heat a dry large skillet over medium. Brush reserved butter over outsides of buns. Toast, buttered side down, until golden, about 3 minutes per side.

Line each bun with a piece of lettuce and spoon in dressed lobster; top with more chives.
Do Ahead: Lobsters can be cooked and shelled and dressing can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill separately.

one-pot-tortellini-bake.name: One Pot Tortellini Bake
instructions: Heat a Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Add ground beef and cook until brown and crumbly, 5 to 10 minutes. Add Italian seasoning, salt, and granulated garlic; mix to combine.
Stir in marinara sauce, diced tomatoes with liquid, water, and red wine until well combined. Reduce heat to low; add tortellini and cook until warmed through, about 10 to 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Add cream cheese to tortellini mixture and stir gently to blend; sprinkle mozzarella cheese over the surface.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheese is melted and golden brown, about 15 minutes. Serve immediately.

onion-rings-recipe-comedera.name: Onion Rings Recipe
instructions: Inicia la receta y ten a la mano todos los ingredientes.
Luego, toma la cebolla, pela y corta en aros aproximadamente 1 cm de grosor.
Posteriormente, en un bol coloca la harina, sal y paprika al gusto y la levadura. Mezcla muy bien.
En otro bol, mezcla la leche, huevo, pimienta y con un poco de harina. Bate muy bien,
Warm up a frying pan with enough oil to fry.
Ahora, incorpora los aros de cebolla en el bol y cubre completamente. Una vez listos, retira el exceso de harina.
Procede y agrega al bol los aros empanizados de harina para que se rebocen en esta de huevo y leche.
Luego, saca del rebozado y termina de pasar por el pan molido.
Once you have complete cover and the oil's hot, get cold till they get light and soft inside.
When they have that texture, remove them from the frying pan and let them slip onto absorbent paper.
Disfruta con tus dips favoritos.

open-mouth-dumplings-lezzet.name: Open Mouth Dumplings
instructions: 1. Unu, pour the dough into the kneading container and open the middle as the pool.
2. In addition to egg yolks, salt and azar azar water, knead until the middle hardness gets a dough.
3. Cover the dough ball shape with a cloth and rest for 15 minutes.
4. Clean onions for inner material and fine shore.
5. Adding salt and pepper.
6. Take the dough three cloths.
7. Simply open a little thicker than the yufka ready on the sprinkled counter.
8. Cut the Yufka in the form of rounds in the dörder santim diameter.
9. Share the inner material in the middle of each slot and combine it from the middle.
10. Add water to the lubricated oven tray and up to a glass of water.
11. 11. Bake in the oven with a pre-heated 170 degree, adding water as a water is over.
12. For over, add erythe butter in a pan and red pepper.
12. August Take the sleeve to the service plate.
14 July Pour the yogurt and buttered sauce on it.
15. Serve hot.

oven-roasted-apples-recipe-comedera.name: Oven Roasted Apples Recipe
oven-roasted-apples-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de manzanas asadas al horno

ingredients.item: Sugar (cinnamon and additional wine for spray)

instructions: Let's start with a basic step from baked recipes: get them ready. In this case, we'll do it at 200 degrees Celsius.

At once, we'll prepare the surface to install our apples. That's why we'll simply use the oven plate but we'll cover it with baking paper. To date, we'll leave the plate out of the oven that's warming up.
Then we will continue with another basic step for apple recipes: washing these fruits well.

To continue, we will arm ourselves with a sharp knife with which we will cut our apples. We will go straight to the centre, to remove a piece as a tube, containing the heart of each fruit, including branch remains and seeds.
Ahora acomodaremos las cuatro manzanas sobre la bandeja del horno, sin que queden pegadas entre ellas.

We will then have the following ingredients to mix them and prepare some kind of salsa: cinnamon, sugar, wine and butter (optional). The idea is to mix everything well to achieve a homogenous preparation, which we will carefully put into the holes that have been put at the centre of every apple with the aim of bathing the inner walls of the fruit. The idea isn't that the salsa goes down and remains there. The traditional roasted apples have no butter, but I assault them for an optional moisturisation touch.
Before applying apples to the oven, scuba them with some additional sugar and some more drops of wine.
That's right, our apples will be baked for 25 minutes.
Once this time's up, we'll get our apples out of the oven. To serve, they can sprinkle with more cinnamon and if they wish, some drops of honey. They can be accompanied with vanilla or cream.

oven-shrimp-rice-teleculinaria.name: Oven Shrimp Rice
instructions: Bring to the fire a pot with the water seasoned with salt and saffron. Let it boil, gather the rice, stir, cover and lower the heat. Let it cook for about 10 to 12 minutes, or until the rice is well cooked. Release him later with the help of a fork. Reserve.

Cut the leek into fine slices and saute it in a frying pan with olive oil. Add the previously minced chilli and shrimp kernel, previously washed and drained. Add the wine, stir and let it evaporate. Then add the tomato pulp, season with salt and let it cook for a few more minutes until it is clear.
Misture o arroz cozido com o preparado anterior e adicione os ovos, ligeiramente batidos, o leite de coco, metade do queijo da ilha ralado e um pouco de coentros picados. Envolva bem.

Garnish an oven tray with a thread of olive oil, pour the mixture of rice into it and sprinkle it with the rest of the cheese. Take it in the oven, preheated to 190oC, for about 20 minutes, or until it's well gratined. Serve with a mixed salad.

oysters-rockefeller-sandwich-po-boy.name: Oysters Rockefeller Sandwich (po-boy)
instructions: **For the Rockefeller sauce:** Melt 2 sticks of unsalted butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the 1 1/2 cups diced onions and 3 ounces diced garlic to the skillet and cook until golden brown, about 10 minutes.
Carefully add the 4 ounces anise liqueur. (CAUTION: Skillet will flame up when using a gas range.)

Stir in 4 cups half-and-half, 4 ounces hot sauce, 2 tablespoons granulated garlic, 2 tablespoons granulated onion, 1 tablespoon ground white pepper, and 1 tablespoon ground thyme. Bring the mixture to a simmer.
Add the 2 pounds thawed frozen spinach and bring the sauce back to a simmer.
Turn off the heat. Stir in 2 cups breadcrumbs and 1 1/2 cups grated Parmesan.
Check the consistency of the sauce: if there's too much liquid, add more breadcrumbs and cheese; if it's too thick, add more half-and-half.
**For the fry dredge:** In a large bowl, whisk together 3 cups yellow corn flour, 1 cup all-purpose flour, 1 cup Creole seasoning, and 1 cup lemon pepper.
**For the sandwich:** Melt 4 tablespoons unsalted butter and 2 tablespoons chopped garlic in a small skillet.
Cut the French bread loaf. "Paint" the inside of the bread with the garlic butter.
Firmly press the inside of the bread down on a large skillet or flat-top grill to toast it.

In a large heavy-bottomed saucepan, pour enough vegetable oil to fill the pan about a third of the way. Heat over medium heat until a deep-frying thermometer inserted in the oil reaches 177°C (177°C). (Alternatively, a cube of bread will brown in about 3 minutes if you don't have a thermometer.)
Dredge the 1 quart shucked Louisiana oysters in the fry dredge. Deep-fry, in batches if necessary, until golden brown and firm to the touch, about 2 minutes.
Arrange the fried oysters on the inside of the toasted French bread.
Top the oysters with Rockefeller sauce and garnish with additional grated Parmesan.
